name: U.S. Physical Therapy, Inc.
description: Founded in 1990, U.S. Physical Therapy, Inc. is a leading operator of outpatient physical and occupational therapy clinics across the United States. The company provides comprehensive care, including preventative and post-operative treatment for orthopedic and sports-related injuries, as well as rehabilitation for neurologically-related conditions. Beyond its clinic operations, the company manages facilities for third-party hospitals and physician groups and offers specialized industrial injury prevention services. These services include onsite injury prevention, performance optimization, and ergonomic assessments, all aimed at supporting a healthy workforce and providing high-quality, patient-centered care through a unique partnership-based business model.
